# JsonRpcMessage record

Base type for the three kinds of framed JSON-RPC message — request, notification, and response (success or error) — defined in §3. A message's kind is determined structurally (§3.1); see [`JsonRpcMessageSerializer`](./JsonRpcMessageSerializer.md) for classification and (de)serialization.

```csharp
public abstract record JsonRpcMessage
```
